description: This file defines user roles and access policy generation functions for a serverless SaaS architecture, including role checks and dynamic IAM policy creation based on user roles and tenant information.

classes.name: UserRoles
classes.description: Defines constants for different user roles in the architecture.

methods.name: isTenantAdmin
methods.description: Checks if the user role is TenantAdmin.

methods.name: isSystemAdmin
methods.description: Checks if the user role is SystemAdmin.

methods.name: isSaaSProvider
methods.description: Checks if the user role is SaaS provider (SystemAdmin or CustomerSupport).

methods.name: isTenantUser
methods.description: Checks if the user role is TenantUser.

methods.name: getPolicyForUser
methods.description: Generates an IAM policy string based on user role and tenant information.

methods.name: __getPolicyForSystemAdmin
methods.description: Creates a policy for system admin with DynamoDB permissions.

methods.name: __getPolicyForTenantAdmin
methods.description: Creates a policy for tenant admin with DynamoDB permissions, conditioned on tenant ID and service identifier.

methods.name: __getPolicyForTenantUser
methods.description: Creates a policy for tenant user with DynamoDB permissions conditioned on tenant ID.
